title: Helldorado
writer: Frank Mitchell Dazey, Philip Dunne, Frances Hyland
actors: Richard Arlen, Madge Evans, Ralph Bellamy
plot: Arthur T. Ryan, a hitchhiker, gets a ride from haughty, society girl Glenda Wynant and her fiance, wealthy J. F. Van Avery after he helps them to replace the top of their convertible when it begins to rain. As they approach a brid...
